scripts.test:backend: uv run --directory apps/api pytest --cov-report=json:coverage.json && uv run --project apps/api python scripts/check_backend_coverage.py apps/api/coverage.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @coeus/web typecheck && uv run --directory apps/api mypy src
scripts.format:check: pnpm --filter @coeus/web format:check && uv run --directory apps/api ruff format --check src tests
scripts.contracts:check: uv run --project apps/api python scripts/generate_openapi.py --check && uv run --project apps/api python scripts/check_openapi_compatibility.py --baseline-ref origin/main
